VORFALE_TWEAKS.random-ambient-sounds.hin: Let ambient sounds play random files from a folder or wildcard path at random intervals.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.random-ambient-sounds.des: Adds random wildcard playback controls to Ambient Sound configuration sheets.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.random-ambient-sounds.Ena: Use the source path as a folder or wildcard such as sounds/rain/* and play random positional one-shots instead of the configured loop.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.random-ambient-sounds.Pat: Examples: sounds/rain/*, sounds/rain/*.ogg, or sounds/rain. The regular source file remains a valid fallback.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.random-ambient-sounds.NoF: No audio files found for random ambient sound.
